variables.notes: No single explicit consolidated SG&A row is present. Selected core overhead components and included dedicated R&D rows as required so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD yields SG&A excluding R&D. Excluded depreciation/amortization subcomponents, 'Other Operating Expenses' (more non-recurring/mixed), and subtotal/balancing rows.
